content.title: What Is Hermes? The Self-Improving AI Agent Coming for OpenClaw
content.summary: Nous Research's open-source AI agent is the first with a built-in learning loop—it creates skills from experience, gets better the more you use it, and runs on terminal.

content.title: Fake Ledger App Steals Millions in Bitcoin, Crypto From Holders—Including Musician G. Love
content.summary: A fake Ledger Live app on the Mac App Store duped more than 50 users, swiping more than $9 million in a new crypto scam.

content.title: Senators Eye Draft Deal on Stablecoin Yield Amid Banking Lobby Pushback
content.summary: Banks and crypto firms remain divided even as White House data says a yield ban wouldn’t do much for lending.

content.title: Circle 'Exploring' Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift: CEO
content.summary: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire reiterated plans for its stablecoin-focused layer-1 blockchain to launch in mainnet “soon.”

content.title: Bitcoin Shorts Get Rekt as BTC Jumps Above $75K, Hitting 2-Month Price High
content.summary: Bitcoin just hit its highest price in over two months, with Ethereum and other top coins rising faster as crypto bears get liquidated.

content.title: Deutsche Börse Acquires Kraken Stake in $200M Deal
content.summary: The Frankfurt exchange operator's investment values Kraken at $13.3 billion, as TradFi giants race to secure footholds in crypto.

content.title: Morning Minute: The SEC Just Gave DeFi The Green Light
content.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum are pumping. DeFi is winning. Saylor is buying big. And Kraken is getting extorted.

content.title: Bitcoin Nears $75K As Risk-on Sentiment, Geopolitical Landscape Improves
content.summary: Bitcoin’s push towards $75K comes amid declining bearish options flow and spot buying, with analysts leaning slightly bullish.

content.title: DOJ Opens $40M Compensation Process for OneCoin Crypto Fraud Victims
content.summary: Victims of the $4 billion OneCoin scam can petition for the opportunity to recover funds from over $40 million in forfeited assets.

content.title: Crypto.com Reveals $1 Million in CRO Fighter Bonuses for White House UFC Fight
content.summary: The crypto exchange will distribute a record $1 million Cronos (CRO) fighter bonus pool at the upcoming UFC fight at the White House.
